entry.title: DMEE Tree Special Character Handlling - Subnode Level
entry.content:
Hello ! 

     We are using CGI_XML_CT Tree as our base XML tree for DMEE. At the PstlAdr node I have added a conversion function to remove national characters ( like Á ) . However the subnodes and atoms nder PstlAdr node have their own conversion functions which do not have RP ( Remove National Char ) on them. Does that mean the conversion function at higher level gets overridded by subnode level conversion? 

The goal is to have no national char in PstlAdr node but the conversion function does not seem to be working. Any pointers?

entry.title: Duplicate Line Items Appearing In Cost Analysis of Process Order
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We are facing an issue of duplicate line item in cost analysis for same material. First line is showing the target qty but showing the actual issued qty as 0 and whereas the second line item is showing actual target qty but  showing the target qty as 0. (Pls refer the red arrow marked lines from snap).

We have checked the cost estimate, Bill of material and it has only one item still we are facing this issue for all orders. It was working fine till the last month but the orders from this month are having this issue. 

Can you pls let me know what should I check to find out the root cause of issue.

Thanks in Advance.

entry.title: Download spool directly in excel
entry.content:
Is it possible to download a processing spool directly into excel ?
For example, in FAGLL03, when we run it online, we can download it directly into excel and all the fields are formatted correctly (date, values). When we run the job and download the spool, these fields are distorted.

entry.title: S_ALR_87013619 report - why there are no drill down reports assigned ?
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

please support with below question:

S_ALR_87013619 report - why there are no drill down reports assigned ?

Thank you and best regards.

Pawel

entry.title: Assets with NBV for already depreciated assets
entry.content:
Issue  Description : For the below asset has NBV and  planned depreciation is not being calculated under posted values tab. Useful life of the asset is already expired.

Kindly suggest on how to depreciate the balance amount lying in the asset.

  •  
  • How to restrict posting to an asset for which NBV is zero and useful life is already expired ?
  •  
  • Also let us know if we can place any BTE validation to avoid such capitalization/acquisition further.
  •  
  • How to identify the asset for which assets are fully depreciated & further acquisitions are made after end of useful life and for which depreciation is not getting posted
  •  

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Adding a Customize Error Message to Asset Reversal in CJ8G if Sequence No in ANEP exceed 98000
entry.content:
Hi All,

Just like the title says, Is there a way that I can add an error message when trying to reverse an asset if the sequence no in ANEP table exceeds 98000? because in AW01N t-code whenever it exceed 99999 in sequence number. the sequence no of the asset that is process turns into blank. So to prevent it from happening i need to create an error message that will says that it already exceed the critical number.

entry.title: MB52
entry.content:
Hi SAP Guru,

After updating stock prices in MB52 the difference amount should be automatically updated in price difference GL however it is not showing.

The GL should ahow the amount of Rs 153360 however it is not showing.

 

please advise.

entry.title: BAPI one time vendor
entry.content:
Hi,

I have the requirement to test a BAPI to post na accounting document but using a one time vendor. Which BAPI and fields in the BAPI I should use?

thanks in advance.

Regards.

entry.title: Special GL
entry.content:
Hi SAP Guru,

I have a query regarding special GL transactions.

I have created one special Gl for eg. 123 against recon account for eg. 456. So now when i m posting the special GL transaction using tcode F-64 the retention GL is showing both the debit and credit line. However my client wants that the debit line should hit the retention GL as they need to hold the money and credit line should hit the reconciliation account.

As per my understanding it is not possible as when we do the entry the recon account is selected automatically and both debit and credit line uses same GL.

Please advise if this is possible or not.

entry.title: FI substitution not triggered from SD Invoice
entry.content:
We currently have an issue with FI substitutions when creating the FI document out of a SD invoice.

Prerequisite: BSEG-MWSKZ = 'L1' AND BSEG-KUNNR IN ZFI_KUNNR

Substitution (if prerequisite is met): SCB Ind. Constant value 566

When creating an invoice in FI the substitution is triggered and the SCB Indicator is filled but when we create an SD Order and creating an invoice (with all the requirements met) the SCB Indicator is not filled.

Do you have any hints or clues on how we can solve this issue?

entry.title: Calculation Methods in Depreciation Key
entry.content:
Hello All, 

I'm trying to better understand how the SAP system prioritizes multiple calculation methods in the depreciation key. I am familiar with the different calculation methods (Base Method, Declining-Balance, Maximum Amount, and Multi-Level Methods), as well as the basics of Straight-Line Depreciation and Written-Down Value.

My question is: when we assign multiple calculation methods in the depreciation key and each method results in a different depreciation value, how does SAP determine which method takes priority for the asset depreciation?

entry.title: Company code numbering release 2408
entry.content:
Hello Expert,

I would like to know if, in release 2408, the logic for numbering the company code has changed.

In CBC, when I define the organisation structure and thus also the company code, is it possible to use a letter as the initial character in the four digits, or must I use a number as the first character? E.g.: "IT10".

Thank you

Francesco

entry.title: Offsetting Account of financial document
entry.content:
Hi All,

As I know, there is logic for determinate the offsetting account of financial document. It will take the largest value of it's corresponding side. (Credit -> Debit,   Debit -> Credit)

But is it possible to get the offsetting account by the same amount in corresponding side?

which like the paring below?

entry.title: SAP Signavio Process Navigator/ Solution Scenario/ mandatory Finance Best Practices
entry.content:
Dear SAP users, 

Which Finance Business Processes are mandatory in a greenfield implementation of SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud (version 2408) for an IT consulting company specializing in outsourcing consultants? The company provides professional services, primarily to the public sector, and aims to optimize its financial processes with this implementation. Considering the focus on project-based services and resource management, which financial processes do you believe are essential to include in the scope?

In SAP Signavio Process Navigator I see the following list: 

Accounting and Financial Close
-
Advanced Accounting and Financial Close
-
Advanced Financial Operations
-
Cost Management and Profitability Analysis
-
Enterprise Risk and Compliance
-
Environmental Footprint Management
-
Financial Operations
-
Real Estate Management
-
Subscription Billing and Revenue Management
-
Treasury Management
-

 

 

However, not all are mandatory to implement i guess. 

 

Which FICO expert can advise on this?

entry.title: RFEBKA00 not clearing Documents
entry.content:
We were originally on ECC and upgrade to S4 1 - 2 years ago.  Everything is working fine with RFEBKA00 and clearing documents properly with Banks that were set up before the S4 conversion. 

Now we have added a new bank.  We copied an existing pre processing program that calls RFEBKA00, because we needed to remove the leading zeros from the checks.  When running this new program,  the checks are marked as cashed, but not clearing and making the entry.  

Because we are using the same variant in RFEBKA00 as other banks that are working, I am thinking that end should be configured correctly.  

TCode OT83 is created consistent with the other banks, and FBZP looks consistent with the Account Numbers. 

I am wondering if there is another piece of configuration (may different between ECC and S4) that is missing.  

Thanks in advance for any guidance you can provide.

entry.title: Unable to pass Debited account into BAPI_PAYMENTREQUEST_CREATE
entry.content:
Hi,

 

We are creating payment requests programmatically using the BAPI_PAYMENTREQUEST_CREATE to update the table PAYRQ. However, we are unable to update the debited account for the payment requests to the table PAYRQC-KONTO since there is no parameter in the BAPI to pass this information. 

 

Is there any way that the debited account can be updated for payment requests programmatically?

 

 

 

Regards,

entry.title: cost center blocked against revenue postings at the time of payment f110
entry.content: at the of payment of vendor bills through t-code F110 there is an error  cost center blocked against revenue postings  but in purchase order there is no cost center updated how system will throw this error

entry.title: issue with production liters
entry.content:
Hello Team Good Morning,

I have a doubt on Process order concepts and production orders, one of my client having an issue with orders, in KEU1  I created a CO-PA assessment Cycle based on , Sender is the one cost center and One cost element and Receivers , i am taking here product (Finished Good ), orders created in the t.code (COR1 ) and also taking the Division. when i am executing the Cycle in KEU5 its giving an error there no receivers.

and i taken as a base in Receiver Tracing factor is Cost Of Goods manufactured account.

here i am giving the some screenshots for your reference please advice me how i can allocate the cost based on process orders here my client is using the Account Based CO-PA.

 

 

 

 

 

KEU5 i am not the tracing factor in Quantity as i given in orders. how i can do this .please solve the issue

KEU5 execution i am getting these errors.

why its not allocating the cost based on COGM a/c please give proper solution for this issue.

entry.title: Could Not performe a simple Excel export.
entry.content:
Dear Support : 

when we select the following informations, 

 

FBL3N - Accounts: 63000000 -73999999
Formatting /AZZAB2

we cannot export them to excel, we have this the error "XSLT: No valid xml source. ", like if the system confuse between excel and xml the moment of the export: 
we cannot export to excel with the error : invalid xml source. 

Do you have any suggestions about this issue? 

Regards,

entry.title: SRM transfer shopping cart to ECC
entry.content: We have a few shopping carts that did not update accounting in ECC.  They are not stored in MM in ECC, just accounting impact.  They seem to all be deleted lines.  /SAPPSSRM/SC_COMMIT_REPOST does not work.  We have seen note 3473514 and are working on testing it.  Our change management process takes some time to get things to production so we are looking for something we may be able to use ASAP.  Any thoughts welcome, thank you!
